items.title: A Wave of Unexplained Bot Traffic Is Sweeping the Web
items.description: From small publishers to US federal agencies, websites are reporting unusual spikes in automated traffic linked to IP addresses in Lanzhou, China.

items.title: OpenAI’s President Gave Millions to Trump. He Says It’s for Humanity
